properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 C3 V4 C3 V5 C3

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: I look over the land and sea Pondering the prophecies of things that are to be And how they pertain to me.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: I see the junction of time Wherein man's destroying himself again, But by the vision of the world I see ashes on every turn He'll never forsake His own Before the first bomb falls we'll be gone

verse.name: C3
verse.lines: To the other dimension travelling Faster than the speed of light, The same way those angels came that day Quicker than you can blink your eyes Changing dimensions, Changing dimensions, Changing dimensions.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: We are waiting at the gate, Our flight is about to leave, We've passed through all the checkpoints Through all security.

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Our pilot is King Theophany Jesus, On the wings of an eagle leads us, The token is on display We can now be on our way And just before the fire falls He'll deliver our soul from this world.
